arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Legia Warsaw Conference League quarter-final clash predicted
arts.sum: Chelsea enter the second leg of their Conference League quarter-final clash against Legia Warsaw with a healthy three-goal lead, and barring an incredible comeback from the Polish side, the Blues have all but confirmed their spot in the semi-finals of the competition. A win, draw, or defeat by two goals or less will confirm Chelsea's spot in the Conference League semi-finals, where the Blues will face either Austrian side Rapid Vienna or Swedish side Djurgarden.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Tottenham keen to re-sign former player, but face Chelsea competition
arts.sum: Tottenham are keen on a potential move to re-sign Kyle Walker-Peters this summer, but a number of other Premier League clubs are also considering him. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Spurs are showing the strongest interest in Walker-Peters for the moment. arts.sum: Chelsea continues to be linked with numerous strikers in the transfer rumour mill, so fans will be eager to see if they’ve got someone new...

arts.sum: Arsenal are one of the clubs leading the race to sign Real Betis wonderkid Jesus Rodriguez this summer, sources have told CaughtOffside. The Gunners have had their scouts closely monitor Rodriguez in recent games in La Liga, as have both Liverpool and Chelsea. arts.ttl: Chelsea star to be dropped after breaking Enzo Maresca's one rule and his controversial decision
arts.sum: When Chelsea went 1-0 down 15 minutes later and Ipswich pushed for a second, Sanchez again tried to build from the back only for the ball to be lost in defence and a shot at goal taken. In place of Petrovic, Maresca turned back to Robert Sanchez, who Chelsea bought from Brighton in 2023.

arts.sum: Joe Cole has hailed Borussia Dortmund's transfer business as Serhou Guirassy, who was only signed in the summer, continued to produce in their Champions League campaign as he tipped Arsenal to consider a move

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Club World Cup rival plot ambitious move for outcast Joao Felix
arts.sum: Joao Felix joined Chelsea in a permanent deal in the summer but was loaned out to AC Milan in February and now Benfica are eyeing up a loan deal before the Club World Cup
